Why Choose Us

The Alfla Constructions Difference

We don't just install roofs — we build lasting relationships with homeowners who deserve a contractor they can trust.

Licensed & Fully Insured

We carry full liability and workers' compensation insurance. Your property and peace of mind are fully protected.

10+ Years of Experience

A decade of perfecting our craft. We've handled hundreds of roofs — simple repairs to complex full replacements.

Premium Materials Only

We partner with top-tier manufacturers. Every project uses materials rated for durability, energy efficiency, and aesthetics.

Workmanship Guarantee

We stand behind every nail. Our work is backed by a solid warranty so you're covered long after we're done.

Transparent Communication

No surprises. Clear quotes, honest timelines, and a dedicated point of contact from start to finish.

Competitive Pricing

Premium quality doesn't have to break the bank. We offer fair, competitive pricing with flexible financing options.

Our Services

Complete Roofing Solutions

From new construction to emergency repairs — we have the expertise and resources to handle any roofing project.

Most Popular

New Roof Installation

Expert installation for new construction or complete roof tear-offs. We work with all roofing systems to suit your style, budget, and climate.

Built to last 25–50 years

Roof Restoration

Extend the life of your existing roof with targeted restoration. Cost-effective alternative to full replacement when structural integrity is sound.

Save up to 50% vs replacement

Roof Replacement

Full roof replacement with premium materials and expert installation. We handle everything from removal and disposal to the final clean-up.

Clean removal & disposal included

Maintenance & Repair

Proactive maintenance programs and rapid repair service to address leaks, storm damage, and wear before they become expensive problems.

Emergency response available
Free

Free Roof Inspection

Our certified inspectors evaluate your roof's condition, identify vulnerabilities, and provide a detailed report — completely free of charge.

No obligation, no pressure

Storm Damage Assessment

After severe weather, we provide rapid assessment and documentation to support your insurance claim and get your roof restored fast.

Insurance claim assistance
How It Works

Working With Us Is Simple

Four straightforward steps from first contact to finished roof. We've made the process as easy as possible for you.

01

Free Inspection

Schedule your no-cost, no-obligation roof inspection. Our certified expert will assess your roof's condition and identify any issues.

02

Detailed Quote

Receive a transparent, itemized quote with no hidden fees. We walk you through every line item and answer all your questions.

03

Expert Installation

Our skilled team completes the work efficiently, using premium materials. We maintain a clean work site and keep you informed daily.

04

Warranty & Follow-Up

We do a final walkthrough together, deliver your warranty documentation, and follow up to ensure your complete satisfaction.

Ready to get started? It only takes a minute.

Client Reviews

Don't Take Our Word For It

5.0 · 120+ Google Reviews
"Alfla Constructions replaced our entire roof after storm damage. The crew was professional, fast, and the result is beautiful. They handled everything — even the insurance paperwork."
JP

James & Patricia H.

North District · Full Roof Replacement

"Called them for a free inspection and they found issues I had no idea about. No pressure, just honest advice. Had them do the repair and it was done in one day. Excellent work."
CM

Carlos M.

Westside · Roof Repair

"We got three quotes and Alfla was not the cheapest — but they were clearly the most professional. Two years later, the roof looks perfect. Worth every penny."
LT

Linda & Tom R.

Oakwood · New Installation

"I was nervous about a big roofing job but the team made it so easy. Clear communication, on-time arrival, and they left my yard cleaner than they found it. Will 100% recommend."
SP

Sandra P.

South Bay · Roof Restoration

"Emergency repair after a bad storm. They were out the next morning, identified the issue within minutes, and had it patched the same day. Lifesavers."
MD

Mike D.

Heritage Heights · Emergency Repair

"The free inspection was thorough and detailed. They showed me photos of every issue and explained everything clearly. Very trustworthy company — they've earned a customer for life."
RG

Rosa G.

Eastview · Inspection & Repair

FAQ

Common Questions Answered

Have more questions? Call us or request your free inspection and we'll address everything.

Most residential roof replacements take 1–3 days depending on the size and complexity of the project. We work efficiently without rushing — quality is our priority. We'll give you a precise timeline during your free consultation.

Costs vary based on roof size, pitch, material choice, and any underlying repairs needed. Most residential projects range from $8,000 to $25,000. We provide detailed, itemized quotes so you know exactly what you're paying for — no surprises.

Yes! We work with financing partners to offer flexible payment plans. Many homeowners can start their project with little to no money down. Ask about our current financing options during your free inspection.

Storm damage, hail, and wind damage are typically covered by homeowner's insurance. We'll help document the damage and provide the detailed reports your insurance company needs. We've helped hundreds of homeowners navigate the claims process.

We offer a workmanship warranty on all installations, plus manufacturer warranties on materials. Depending on the product, material warranties range from 25 years to lifetime coverage. Full warranty details are provided in writing before any work begins.

We install asphalt shingles, metal roofing, tile, flat/TPO roofing systems, and more. During your inspection, we'll recommend the best material for your home's style, climate, and budget.

Not necessarily. While we appreciate homeowners being available for the initial walkthrough and final inspection, our crews can work independently once the project is underway. We'll keep you updated with photos and daily progress reports.

That's exactly what our free inspection is for! Our inspector will honestly assess whether a repair or replacement makes more financial sense for your situation. We'll never recommend more work than necessary.

Still have questions?

Our team is happy to answer anything. Reach out directly — no bots, no runaround.

Call (555) 000-0000
